intro: This is an orphaned transaction ticket. Here is everything needed to resolve the issue.
step_2_text:
Run the Execute workflow to close {ticket_id} automatically:
1- Posts a comment to the client.
2- Leaves an internal AI note.
3- Assigns ticket to you.
4- Logs 30mins to your time.
5- Fill fields and resolve.
